title: White Elm My Beloved
description: Reimplements White Elm Trees into TerraFirmaCraft
body:
White Elm My Beloved does one thing & one thing only, it returns White Elm trees & their respective wood items/blocks to the TerraFirmaCraft mod.
That's it, that's all the mod does.
This mod depends on TerraFirmaCraft to run.

![Image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/509/73/wgute_elm.PNG)
![Image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/509/738/2022-10-28_21.png)
